headerTitle: AI Adoption Manager  ·  Enterprise Change Management  ·  SaaS Onboarding  ·  Legal AI Platform
intro: EvenUp’s AI Adoption Manager owns the critical first 30 days — when a law firm either becomes a true AI shop or reverts to old habits. Six FDE engagements: close the deal on adoption, not just the deployment.
bullets: Change management across non-technical teams — six deployments, six independent teams operating AI-powered workflows post-handoff. Onboarding design, training, champion identification, daily adoption metric tracking. Six for six.

Executive ROI and end-user coaching — former GM presenting business outcomes to ownership while coaching operational staff on the floor the same day. The EvenUp dual communication requirement is the operating mode across every engagement.

Early at-risk intervention — tracked adoption signals (login frequency, feature utilization, declining usage) across all six deployments. Intervened before adoption stalled. The difference between a customer who succeeds and one who churns is a week of ignored signals.
closingLine: Available immediately. Remote US, regional travel flexible.
matchNotes: Strong on change management, exec-to-end-user range, and champion enablement — all demonstrated across 6 FDE cycles. Legal/law firm domain is new but process is transferable. 50% travel is the main constraint. $112K is lower salary — apply anyway given adoption-role match.
